creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
<<<ROOT@unixdev.ceas>>> /home/bacon 1005 # service git_daemon onestart
Starting git_daemon.
ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libpcre.so.1" not found, required by "git-daemon"
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/git_daemon: WARNING: failed to start git_daemon

<<<ROOT@unixdev.ceas>>> /home/bacon 1006 # ldd /usr/local/libexec/git-core/git-daemon 
/usr/local/libexec/git-core/git-daemon:
	libpcre.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre.so.1 (0x8003a5000)
	libz.so.6 => /lib/libz.so.6 (0x800447000)
	libintl.so.8 => /usr/local/lib/libintl.so.8 (0x800461000)
	libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x80046e000)
	libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x800499000)

<<<ROOT@unixdev.ceas>>> /home/bacon 1009 # ls -l /usr/local/lib/libpcre.so*
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel      17 Dec 12 19:17 /usr/local/lib/libpcre.so@ -> libpcre.so.1.2.10
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel      17 Dec 12 19:17 /usr/local/lib/libpcre.so.1@ -> libpcre.so.1.2.10
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  658504 Dec 12 19:17 /usr/local/lib/libpcre.so.1.2.10*

<<<ROOT@unixdev.ceas>>> /home/bacon 1012 # ldconfig -r | grep pcre
	237:-lpcre.1 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre.so.1
	366:-lpcre2-8.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre2-8.so.0
	377:-lpcreposix.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcreposix.so.0
	380:-lpcre2-posix.2 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre2-posix.so.2
	472:-lpcre2-32.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre2-32.so.0
	494:-lpcrecpp.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcrecpp.so.0
	520:-lpcre16.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre16.so.0
	637:-lpcre32.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre32.so.0
	672:-lpcre2-16.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre2-16.so.0

<<<ROOT@unixdev.ceas>>> /home/bacon 1013 # uname -a
FreeBSD unixdev.ceas.uwm.edu 12.0-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p3 GENERIC  amd64

After hacking "ldconfig -r|grep pcre" into rc.d/git_daemon:

---

command="/usr/local/libexec/git-core/git-daemon"
command_args="${git_daemon_directory}"

PATH="${PATH}:/usr/local/libexec/git-core"

ldconfig -r|grep pcre
printf "LD_LIBRARY_PATH='$LD_LIBRARY_PATH'\n"
printenv

run_rc_command "$1"

---

<<<ROOT@unixdev.ceas>>> /home/bacon 1025 # service git_daemon onestart
	237:-lpcre.1 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre.so.1
	366:-lpcre2-8.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre2-8.so.0
	377:-lpcreposix.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcreposix.so.0
	380:-lpcre2-posix.2 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre2-posix.so.2
	472:-lpcre2-32.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre2-32.so.0
	494:-lpcrecpp.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcrecpp.so.0
	520:-lpcre16.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre16.so.0
	637:-lpcre32.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre32.so.0
	672:-lpcre2-16.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre2-16.so.0
LD_LIBRARY_PATH=''
PATH=/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/libexec/git-core
PWD=/
HOME=/
RC_PID=66566
Starting git_daemon.
ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libpcre.so.1" not found, required by "git-daemon"
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/git_daemon: WARNING: failed to start git_daemon

I'm stumped...
